section_miscategorizations.text: A recent MRI is pending to rule out other causes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: A pending MRI is an objective diagnostic workup status rather than an assessment statement; it would more typically be documented with other studies and results, though its placement in A does not substantially mislead the reader.

section_miscategorizations.text: Further investigation with a spinal tap is planned.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit future diagnostic plan (a procedure to be ordered), which belongs in the Plan section rather than the Assessment.
